legend.content_tier_full: Primary learning material is in the app (Learn/Steps/Code tabs).
legend.content_tier_partial: Some on-page depth; may still expand.
legend.content_tier_scaffold: Legacy label: use content/modules/mNNN.json + rebuild to change tier.
legend.self_contained_yes: No external reading required to complete the module.
legend.self_contained_no: References are starting points; on-page narrative still thin.
